postCreateCommand.git-https: if [ -z "$CODESPACES" ]; then git config --global url.'https://github.com/'.insteadOf 'git@github.com:'; fi
postCreateCommand.git-identity: GH_USER=$(gh api /user --jq '.login' 2>/dev/null) && gh_name=$(gh api /user --jq '.name // empty' 2>/dev/null) && git config --global user.name "${gh_name:-$GH_USER}" && git config --global user.email "${GH_USER}@users.noreply.github.com"
